creator: freebsd-ports@charlieroot.de
text:
(In reply to w.schwarzenfeld from comment #1)

[helmut@BSDHelmut1064 ~]$ grep -i ssl /etc/make.conf
DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=ssl=libressl-devel
#WITH_OPENSSL_PORT=yes
#OPENSSL_PORT=security/libressl-devel
p5-Mail-SpamAssassin_UNSET+=SSL
www_squid_SET+=AUTH_KERB AUTH_LDAP LARGEFILE SNMP SSL
squid31_SET+=SQUID_LDAP_AUTH SQUID_SSL SQUID_REFERER_LOG SQUID_USERAGENT_LOG SQUID_LARGEFILE
squid32_SET+=AUTH_KERB AUTH_LDAP LARGEFILE SNMP SSL
squid33_SET+=AUTH_KERB AUTH_LDAP LARGEFILE SNMP SSL
squid34_SET+=AUTH_KERB AUTH_LDAP LARGEFILE SNMP SSL
squid35_SET+=AUTH_KERB AUTH_LDAP LARGEFILE SNMP SSL
[helmut@BSDHelmut1064 ~] sudo portupgrade puppet4-4.4.1
[Reading data from pkg(8) ... - 306 packages found - done]
